productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Off-White and Blue Pumps
description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of pumps is one reason why we love the summer! This season fantastical burts of colour and bright metallic tones are SO in! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsGrey and blue shoes with lace-ups at the toe box for style and slip-on stylingSoft, footbed with a brand patchTPU outsole with an upraised heel and floral lugsMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
